title: TRIBAL MEMBER SERVICES - 211info
text: CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF SILETZ INDIANS TRIBAL MEMBER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF General office for intake and programming information. 201 SE Swan Avenue Siletz, OR 97380 Eligibility: Federally recognized members or children of the Siletz Indian Tribe Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm (541) 444-2532 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 444-2532 Main phone (541) 444-1030 Clinic Toll-free (800) 922-1399 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Benton, Clackamas, Lane, Lincoln, Linn, Marion, Multnomah, Polk, Tillamook, Washington, and Yamhill Counties Services: Native American General Assistance Specialized Information and Referral * Native American Community Tribal Council Offices Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - HEAD START LEGAL SERVICES - SOCIAL SECURITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF SILETZ INDIANS
